channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: 28th Sunday after Pentecost
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: 28th Sunday after Pentecost

item.title: 28th Sunday after Pentecost, The Blind Man Who Cried Jesus Son Of David Have Mercy On Me, The True Meaning Of Lord Have Mercy, 2007-12-09
item.description: :28th Sunday after Pentecost. The Blind Man Who Cried Jesus Son Of David Have Mercy On Me, The True Meaning Of Lord Have Mercy, 2007-12-09
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :28th Sunday after Pentecost. The Blind Man Who Cried Jesus Son Of David Have Mercy On Me, The True Meaning Of Lord Have Mercy, 2007-12-09

item.title: 28th Sunday after Pentecost, Partakers of the inheritance of the saints, Read the scriptures!, 2010-12-04
item.description: :28th Sunday after Pentecost. In this on a Sunday (a short talk after liturgy), the important selection from the first chapter of Colossions is discussed, with an emphasis on the context of the selection and the important Christological dogma expressed, which was later faithfully reproduced in the Symbol of Faith. It is important to read this passage correctly, as some heretics, such as the Arians (Jehovah Witnesses) do not understand the phrase . Also, the importance of reading the scriptures is mentioned.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :28th Sunday after Pentecost. In this on a Sunday (a short talk after liturgy), the important selection from the first chapter of Colossions is discussed, with an emphasis on the context of the selection and the important Christological dogma expressed, which was later faithfully reproduced in the Symbol of Faith. It is important to read this passage correctly, as some heretics, such as the Arians (Jehovah Witnesses) do not understand the phrase . Also, the importance of reading the scriptures is mentioned.
